subject: Request for Approval — Technical Specifications & Design Criteria
body:
To: Technical Evaluator, AP Fisheries Department
Subject: Request for Approval — Technical Specifications & Design Criteria for Tender AP/FISH/EPC/2026/001

Reference: Tender Notice AP/FISH/EPC/2026/001 — Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam (EPC).

The AI drafting workspace has structured the Technical Specifications and Design Criteria sections but cannot finalise project-specific engineering content (marine grade steel spec, concrete mix, pile load capacity, fender energy absorption, design wave height, berthing energy, seismic factor) without department-approved input.

Kindly upload approved Technical Specifications, Design Criteria, drawings or BOQ — or confirm use of an approved historical template (Nizampatnam Jetty FY24-25) — to enable publication.

Deadline for action: 2026-05-10
Officer Approval Required: Yes
projectName: Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam (EPC)

subject: Corrigendum-1 — Revision of Financial Capacity Lookback Period & Bid Submission Deadline
body:
To: All prospective bidders
Subject: Corrigendum-1 to Tender AP/FISH/EPC/2026/001

This is to notify all prospective bidders of the following revisions:

1. Financial Capacity Lookback Period revised from five (5) years to ten (10) years.
2. Bid submission deadline extended to 2026-06-22 (15:00 IST).

All other terms and conditions remain unchanged. Bidders are advised to refer to the corrigendum-marked tender document available on the AP eProcurement portal.

Officer Approval Required: Yes
projectName: Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam (EPC)
